phoneticUs: 藢ko蕣ed蕭蓹藞ke瑟蕛蓹n; 藢ko蕣ed蕭蕣藞ke瑟蕛n
examples: Once boys and girls were segregated, teachers resorted to traditional gender stereotypes to run their classes, and within just three years, five of the six districts had gone back to coeducation.
Do you think coeducation is a good model?
Coeducation is very common in North America.
